'''lawïfnïf''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:mycetophagid|mycetophagid]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''inanimate''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-w-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:mycetophagid|mycetophagid]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| inanimate
|-
! Citation form
| lawïfnïf
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || læwïfnïfth || læwïfnïfj || læwïfnïfsh || læwïfnïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || lawïfwïfnïfth || lawïfwïfnïfj || lawïfwïfnïfsh || lawïfwïfnïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || lawïfnïfth || lawïfnïfj || lawïfnïfsh || lawïfnïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || lawïffnïffth || lawïffnïffj || lawïffnïffsh || lawïffnïff
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for inanimate singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || lawïfnïfïf || lawïfnïfïf || lawïfnïfïf || lawïfnïfïf
|-
| [[Patient]] || lawïfnïfth || lawïfnïfj || lawïfnïfsh || lawïfnïf
|-
| [[Possessive]] || lawïfnïfïfl || lawïfnïfïfl || lawïfnïfïfl || lawïfnïfïfl
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || lawïfnïfïfïf || lawïfnïfïfïf || lawïfnïfïfïf || lawïfnïfïfïf
|-
| [[Dative]] || lawïfnïfïfn || lawïfnïfïfn || lawïfnïfïfn || lawïfnïfïfn
|-
| [[Speaker]] || lawïfnïfïforo || lawïfnïfïforo || lawïfnïfïforo || lawïfnïfïforo
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki inanimate nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|d176386}}
